tests.title: The insertion bar footnote modal inserts a reference marker and a matching definition line carrying the exact typed body
errors: Error: TauriPage command 'eval' failed: window.__PPE_E2E__.insertFootnote is not a function. (In 'window.__PPE_E2E__.insertFootnote("P61 distinctive footnote body sentinel 8f3a2c")', 'window.__PPE_E2E__.insertFootnote' is undefined)
